senses.gloss: active participle of أَجَابَ (ʔajāba, “to respond, to reply, to answer”)
active participle of جَيَّبَ (jayyaba, “to provide with a pocket”)
passive participle of جَيَّبَ (jayyaba, “to provide with a pocket”)

etymology.text:
From the root ج و ب (j w b).

From جَيْب (jayb, “pocket”), from the root ج ي ب (j y b).
